name: Clinic Follow-Up Bot — AI Reply Handler

parameters.query: =WITH mem AS (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(json_build_object('role', role, 'content', content, 'sentiment', sentiment, 'intent', intent) ORDER BY timestamp ASC), '[]'::json) as memory_rows FROM (SELECT * FROM conversation_memory WHERE patient_phone = '{{ $('Extract & Normalize').first().json.phone }}' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 20) sub), prof AS (SELECT row_to_json(p.*) as profile FROM patient_followup p WHERE patient_phone = '{{ $('Extract & Normalize').first().json.phone }}' LIMIT 1) SELECT (SELECT memory_rows FROM mem) as memory_rows, (SELECT profile FROM prof) as profile

=INSERT INTO conversation_memory (patient_phone, role, content, sentiment, intent, confidence, session_id) VALUES ('{{ $json.phone }}', 'user', '{{ $json.safeMsg }}', '{{ $json.sentiment }}', '{{ $json.intent }}', {{ $json.confidence || 0.5 }}, '{{ $json.sessionId }}')

=INSERT INTO conversation_memory (patient_phone, role, content, sentiment, intent, confidence, session_id) VALUES ('{{ $json.phone }}', 'assistant', '{{ $json.safeReply }}', '{{ $json.sentiment }}', '{{ $json.intent }}', {{ $json.confidence || 0.5 }}, '{{ $json.sessionId }}')

=UPDATE patient_followup SET sentiment = '{{ $json.sentiment }}', sentiment_score = {{ $json.sentiment_score || 0.5 }}, patient_replied = true, last_reply = '{{ $json.safeMsg }}', last_intent = '{{ $json.intent }}', review_link_sent = CASE WHEN {{ $json.send_review_link === true }} THEN true ELSE review_link_sent END, escalated_to_manager = CASE WHEN {{ $json.escalate === true }} THEN true ELSE escalated_to_manager END, escalation_reason = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.safeEscReason }}' != '' THEN '{{ $json.safeEscReason }}' ELSE escalation_reason END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE patient_phone = '{{ $json.phone }}'

=INSERT INTO clinic_operations_log (patient_phone, event_type, event_data, sentiment_score) VALUES ('{{ $json.phone }}', 'whatsapp_reply', '{"intent":"{{ $json.intent }}","sentiment":"{{ $json.sentiment }}","escalate":{{ $json.escalate === true }},"booking_ready":{{ $json.booking_ready === true }}}'::jsonb, {{ $json.sentiment_score || 0.5 }})

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ "clinic_id": 1, "patient_phone": $('Parse Groq Response').first().json.phone.replace('+',''), "patient_name": $('Parse Groq Response').first().json.booking_name, "appointment_date": $('Parse Groq Response').first().json.booking_date, "appointment_time": $('Parse Groq Response').first().json.booking_time, "doctor_name": $('Parse Groq Response').first().json.booking_doctor, "notes": $('Parse Groq Response').first().json.booking_notes }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({"number": $('Build Groq Payload').first().json.managerPhone, "text": "🚨 تنبيه: مريض يحتاج متابعة
اسم: " + $('Parse Groq Response').first().json.booking_name + "
رقم: " + $('Parse Groq Response').first().json.phone + "
رسالة: " + $('Extract & Normalize').first().json.message}) }}

parameters.query: =INSERT INTO conversation_memory (patient_phone, role, content, sentiment, intent, confidence, session_id) VALUES ('{{ $('Parse Groq Response').first().json.phone }}', 'system', '<<BOOKED>>', 'positive', 'booking', 1.0, '{{ $('Parse Groq Response').first().json.sessionId }}')
